hacaec421gbd55g4c2ag8cc7g79a4bdeb3e5c: *You've already explored the top of the wall - there's no reason to risk breaking your neck again.*
h0cecdafag6562g44efgac33gf2053994eea9: *Your previous route up the wall is impassable, and you can't see an alternative.*
hab4e9ee8ge2e8g42c4ga386ge681d258a49e: *You can't see beyond the rim of the topmost hole, but it's large enough to explore - if you can reach it.*
h88d7bf60g5a23g43ebgaf91g26abda1f7110: *Using the smaller holes as footholds, you clamber up the wall swiftly, and establish a firm grip on the hole's rim.*
h2796e6aegdaaeg4d86g9a8fg624b318a6a53: *The interior forms a small basin, in which a pool of thick ooze has coagulated.*
h7406efa3g9853g4ebbg9eacg8315f41fcfaf: *This highly viscous substance is the toxic mucus of the carrion crawlers that dwelled in these holes.*
h1e7df549ge8d0g4c6egbe9eg9729a537f0c4: *This viscous foul-smelling substance is a toxic mucus. The creature it originated from is nowhere to be seen.*
hff578383ga9ddg4d46ga31fg8e7509e8581f: *The fluid is viscous and pungent, with a thin crust.*
hee1eb0ccg2ae8g49a8gb410gb2e83b37a1bd: *A large dollop of the liquid adheres to your weapon.*
hf39c26afgca8eg4137gb2abg850d6b43899c: Gather the substance in a secure container.
hecbb8b4dg4edcg4f6bg9833gbfacdc3e12e8: *You scoop up a small quantity of the liquid, taking care not to let it touch your flesh.*
h7aba5414gf641g4fb2ga636g50d793f50328: *As you're scooping up the liquid, your fingers touch the surface. A spasm shoots through your arm.*
h076f8fccg46b4g44a6g83cbg47e9c38dc568: *A wave of nausea and numbness shudders through your body, but you resist and maintain your grip on the wall.*
h1c856e01gb49cg4e9aga1f5gd4d0f6e92fd4: *The numbness spreads through your body. You lose your grip and fall, not even able to brace for impact.*
he65ed28egdb90g4fc6g8163gfd19f4a0a87d: *As soon as it touches the tip of your tongue, your jaw hangs slack, your face numb. Your head swims.*
h6e66cb29gc840g47b1g9b38gf12f7a2afb61: *As you're descending, a handhold crumbles under your weight. You lose your grip and teeter backwards.*
hfb4debbfgf1bfg4b7bgb87fgd0e79ca613db: *Instinctively, you lean forward and grab a rough outcrop. You maintain your grip, then quickly descend to stable ground.*
h32c3933bge499g40dfgb5e9g31435a0fcd4f: *You reach for another hand-hold but clutch at air, then plummet backwards.*
h1e4b1cdcg134bg4cbdg8990gc0c277a546a4: *You're halfway up the wall when one of your handholds crumbles.*
h3d6c2f7ag6f1cg4f77ga305g6380b2049d69: *The stone clatters off the top edge of the hole, then falls inside - you hear a muffled 'plop'.*
